subject: Request for Quote - Office Furniture
body:
Hello,

My name is Sarah Mitchell and I'm the office manager at TechVentures Ltd. We are currently expanding our Cape Town office and are looking to furnish two new floors.

We need a quote for the following:
- 50 ergonomic office chairs
- 25 standing desks
- 10 conference room chairs

We'd need delivery by 15 April 2025. Please include bulk pricing and any available discounts.

Kind regards,
Sarah Mitchell
TechVentures Ltd

subject: Need to reschedule our meeting
body:
Hi,

This is James Okonkwo. I had a consultation booked for Wednesday the 9th at 2pm but unfortunately I have a conflict — our board meeting got moved to that exact slot.

Could we please reschedule to either Thursday the 10th at 10am or Friday the 11th at 3pm?

Appreciate your flexibility.

Best,
James Okonkwo

subject: Invoice #INV-2024-0892 attached
body:
Dear Accounts Team,

Please find attached Invoice #INV-2024-0892 from Bright Consulting Services for the web development project completed in March 2024.

Invoice details:
- Amount: R48,500 (excl. VAT)
- VAT (15%): R7,275
- Total: R55,775
- Payment due: 30 days from invoice date

Please process at your earliest convenience. Bank details are included on the invoice.

Thank you,
Priya Naidoo
Bright Consulting Services

subject: Pricing enquiry for bulk printing
body:
Good morning,

I'm writing on behalf of Mzansi Events Co. My name is Thabo Dlamini, and we're organising a corporate conference for 300 delegates next month.

We'd like to get pricing for:
- 300 branded folders
- 300 name badges
- 10 pull-up banners
- 50 table cards

Would appreciate a quote as soon as possible as we are comparing suppliers. Delivery to Johannesburg CBD.

Regards,
Thabo Dlamini
Mzansi Events Co

subject: Appointment cancellation and rebooking
body:
Hello,

I'm Amara Diallo and I need to cancel my appointment scheduled for Monday 7 April at 9:30am. A family emergency has come up and I won't be able to make it.

I would like to rebook for the following week if possible — any slot on Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon would work for me.

Sorry for the short notice and thank you for understanding.

Warm regards,
Amara Diallo

subject: Supplier invoice for April services
body:
Hi Finance Team,

Attached please find our monthly service invoice for April 2024.

Company: CleanEdge Facilities Management
Invoice #: CE-APR-2024
Services: Office cleaning, waste management, and hygiene supplies
Amount due: R12,800
Due date: 15 April 2024

Payment via EFT to the bank details listed on the invoice. Please send remittance advice to accounts@cleanedge.co.za

Thank you for your continued business.

Linda Ferreira
CleanEdge Facilities Management
